input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.4.3
            TITLE: exterior and interior walls must cover a minimum of 75% of each face of the battery segments

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.4.3: Exterior and interior walls must cover a minimum of 75% of each face of the battery segments
F.10.4.3 Exterior and interior walls must cover a minimum of 75% of each face of the battery segments

final_answer: Exterior and interior walls must cover a minimum of 75% of each face of the battery segments
